candidates.rationale: Add only a defensible organisation record and an editable FAIRsharing field.
Add the manuscript or related publication only when a stable public identifier is available.
Do not infer citation relationships from the repository or DOI alone.
Create associations only where the related FAIRsharing record and relationship are authoritative.

fairsharing.next_action: Check curator guidance or authenticated editable fields before proposing any update.

candidates.rationale: Add only with a stable Wikidata property and a reference that directly supports the statement.
Applications in health do not by themselves establish that UOGTO is a biomedical ontology.
Add a publication statement after the manuscript has a stable public identifier.

policy: Repository evidence is complete; external curation and schema-supported enrichment remain gates.
